titleStmt.title: SII 17.331: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 331. (A.R. No. 302 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the shrine immediately to the south of the first prākāra of the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.
The details of date given in the record, viz., Śaka 1491, Śukla, Vṛiśchika ba. 14, Ādivāra, Pūraṭṭādi are irregular.

This records the agreements between the Kaṇkāṇis of the Kāḷahasti temple and Nagarattār of Uttiramallūr, in connection with a gift of 50 pon, made for services in the maṭha (name lost) and for offerings in the shrine of Āṟakam Piḷḷaiyār, for the merit of the local devotees of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīman mahārājādirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira śatarcivadeva
mahārāyar pradhivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 9 10 1 n mel cel
lāniṉṟa cukkila caṅvatsarattu pṛścikaṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu śatuṟdeśiyum Ātivāra
mum peṟṟa pūreṭṭāti nakṣattirattu ṉāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭacoṣa maṇṭala
ttu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭil tirukāḷahastiyāṉa mummuṭicoṣapurattil ṉāyaṉār
kaṅ(?)kāṇam ceyvārkaḷom Uttiramallūrilirukkum nakarattāril Akam
cella yan Uḷḷiṭṭu bhaktajanaṅkaḷukku Ubhaya cācanam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi
taṅkaḷukku puṇyayamāka koyil cevai maṭattil pūjai koṇṭaru
ḷum �aiva Eṇṇai pūjai ṉayvedyattukku kuṭutta yinta poṉ Aṉpa
tu ṭṭu kuḻiveṭṭuvittu kalveṭṭi tāṉ Anta mutal koṇṭu
nāḷ Oṉṟukku tirukkoyilil viṭṭuvarum Āṟakam piḷḷaiyār pūjai ṉaiyvedyayattukku
tiruvaḻiyil viṭṭuvarum cempakkāl Amutupaṭiyilum tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai Āḻākkum tiṅka
ḷ tivacam Āḻākkum teṉ viṭṭu cantiṟātittavaraiyum vaṅkiṣa paramparaiyum taṭṭāmal
naṭattivarak kaṭavomākavum Ivai panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.331 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
